quality.rationale: 需结合视界方程降维计算二维子流形度规行列式并积分，具明确天体物理背景

origin.question: Problem 17.13. Show that the surface area of the horizon of a Kerr-Newman black hole (area of surface $\mathbf{r} = \mathbf{r}_{+}$ , $t = \text{constant}$ , in Boyer-Lindquist coordinates) is $4\pi \left[\left[\mathbf{M} + (\mathbf{M}^{2} - \mathbf{Q}^{2} - \mathbf{a}^{2})^{\frac{1}{2}}\right]^{2} + \mathbf{a}^{2}\right]$ .
origin.solution: Solution 17.13. At the outer horizon $(\mathbf{r} = \mathbf{r}_{+})$ the metric with $\mathrm{dt} = \mathrm{dr} = 0$ becomes$$\mathrm {d s}^{2} = \left(\mathrm {r}_{+}^{2} + \mathrm {a}^{2} \cos^{2} \theta\right) \mathrm {d} \theta^{2} + \frac {\left(\mathrm {r}_{+}^{2} + \mathrm {a}^{2}\right)^{2} \sin^{2} \theta \mathrm {d} \phi^{2}}{\left(\mathrm {r}_{+}^{2} + \mathrm {a}^{2} \cos^{2} \theta\right)} .$$The area of the horizon is then$$A = \iint g^{\frac {1}{2}} d \theta d \phi = \iint \left(r_{+}^{2} + a^{2}\right) \sin \theta d \theta d \phi = 4 \pi \left(r_{+}^{2} + a^{2}\right).$$Since $\mathbf{r}_{+}$ is the larger solution of $\Delta = 0$ we have $\mathbf{r}_{+} = \mathbf{M} + (\mathbf{M}^{2} + \mathbf{Q}^{2} - \mathbf{a}^{2})^{\frac{1}{2}}$ from which the result follows.
